# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary assessment artifacts generated for this report.

## Available Documents

- [Architecture Diagram](architecture-diagram.md) - Two-layer architecture and component relationship diagrams.
- [Dependency Map](dependency-map.md) - Functional grouping of external dependencies and version risk notes.
- [API & Service Communication Contracts](api-service-contracts.md) - Service catalog, endpoint inventory, and communication sequence.
- [Data Architecture & Persistence Layer](data-architecture.md) - Database configuration, entity relationships, and repository methods.
- [Configuration & Externalized Settings Inventory](configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, secrets, and runtime settings.
- [Core Business Workflows](business-workflows.md) - Primary business flows, domain mapping, and workflow sequence diagram.
